modmenu.descriptionTranslation.modmenu: Use unused Mojang code to quickly take panoramas!
config.panoramascreenmake.title: Panorama ScreenMake Config
config.panoramascreenmake.tooltip.resolu:
Fixed resolution for panorama images.
Higher values may lag.
config.panoramascreenmake.tooltip.delay: Time to hide UI or hands before shooting.
config.panoramascreenmake.tooltip.path:
Folder inside game directory.
Start with '/' (e.g. /panoramas).
config.panoramascreenmake.error.forbidde: Cannot save to system game folders!
